response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of full-stack engineering experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with strong recent TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP tooling work at re:cinq that directly aligns with the role's internal automation and AI-agent focus. Stack overlap is solid across TypeScript, Node, React, MongoDB, Docker, and Git, with demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev). Gaps around Nest.js, Kotlin, and cloud breadth (only AWS mentioned) are reasonable to probe in interview rather than disqualifying.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matches the role's automation focus
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB background from Optilyz plus strong testing/TDD discipline
Long track record of full-stack delivery across web, mobile, and infrastructure with founder-level ownership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or Java backend service experience listed in recent roles
Cloud exposure appears limited to AWS CDK; GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth unclear
Heavy DLang/Ember.js footprint in earlier roles may indicate less time on the exact modern stack required
